summary: Tested driver location tracking APIs and frontend components. Backend APIs all working correctly (100% pass). Frontend tracking map components could not be fully tested due to lack of active orders with 'out_for_delivery' status.

integration_issues.issue: Page shows 'Order not found' for order cb879398-34e2-4c39-baab-fa2ac28e2567 - customer may not own this order or order is delivered
Dashboard at /food/dashboard shows loading spinner - may need longer wait or auth issue

action_items: Create a new food order and have a driver accept it to test tracking map with 'out_for_delivery' status
critical_code_review_comments: DriverTrackingMap.js: Well-implemented with OSRM route fetching, token authorization via useAuth hook, FitBounds component for map centering
SellerDriverTrackingMap.js: Clean implementation, receives token via props instead of context - good for seller dashboard
delivery.py: Location update API properly updates driver_locations collection and food_orders/orders collections
Authorization check in GET /api/delivery/location/{order_id} allows customer, driver, and admin access

success_rate.frontend: Unable to fully test - no active tracking orders available

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - existing order cb879398 is delivered status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend driver tracking APIs working correctly. To test frontend tracking components, need an order with status 'out_for_delivery' or 'ready' and a driver assigned. Use /food/order/:orderId route (not /food/tracking/:orderId). Rate limiting on login API can cause test failures - add delays between auth calls.

backend_api_test_results.GET /api/delivery/location/{order_id}: ✅ 200 - Returns driver location data with has_driver, driver_latitude, driver_longitude, customer_latitude, customer_longitude
backend_api_test_results.POST /api/food/orders/delivery/smart-rou: ✅ Accessible (returns 404 for non-existent order as expected)
backend_api_test_results.Authorization: ✅ Customers properly blocked from driver-only APIs (403 returned)

components_reviewed.DriverTrackingMap.js: Customer-facing tracking map with OSRM route, refresh button, distance/time display
components_reviewed.SellerDriverTrackingMap.js: Seller-facing tracking map embedded in FoodStoreDashboard for out_for_delivery orders
components_reviewed.FoodOrderTracking.js: Order tracking page shows map when status is 'out_for_delivery' or 'ready'
components_reviewed.FoodStoreDashboard.js: Lines 1768-1774 render SellerDriverTrackingMap for orders with driver_id and out_for_delivery status
